title: HARD RULE: Enforce Planner→Builder→Reviewer for all non-trivial tasks
description: Agent repeatedly skips the PBR pipeline — spawns Builder directly without Planner phase. AGENTS.md already says 'Never skip Planner' but it's treated as a guideline, not a gate. Must be hardened.

examples: Hybrid memory skill: spawned Builder directly, no Planner
RSI Loop skill: built without plan doc
Simmer trade: executed without reading SDK docs first

rule.trigger: sessions_spawn with label containing 'build' or task >500 chars or task mentions 'skill' or 'feature' or 'package'
rule.gate: PLAN.md must exist in target directory before Builder spawns
rule.enforcement: RSI auto_observe checks spawn patterns, flags direct builds without plan phase
rule.exceptions: Bug fixes <100 lines, config changes, doc updates

suggested_actions: Add PBR check to auto_observe: detect spawn without prior plan phase
Add to AGENTS.md as NON-NEGOTIABLE hard rule
RSI analyzer should flag any 'build' spawn not preceded by 'plan' spawn within 30min
